articles.title: Rentomojo IPO: Furniture e-marketplace files DRHP with Sebi; to raise Rs 150 crore from fresh issue
articles.description: E-marketplace Rentomojo Limited has filed its Draft Red Herring Prospectus with Sebi for an Initial Public Offering (IPO), aiming to raise Rs 150 crore through fresh equity issuance. The company, a leader in the home furniture and appliance rental segment, plans to utilize the proceeds for debt repayment, lease rentals, and general corporate purposes.

topStories.title: Big win for Argentina — US appeals court reverses $16 billion ruling linked to oil company seizure
topStories.description: The appeals court ruling marks a significant victory for Argentine President Javier Milei and helps clear the government’s path to a return to international markets at some point.

topStories.title: Quote of the day by Ratan Tata: ‘Ups and downs in life are very important to keep us going, because…’
topStories.description: Ratan Tata's insights stress that life's struggles are necessary for evolution and self-discovery. He advocates for a positive perspective on challenges, viewing them as integral to personal growth and resilience in the journey of life.

topStories.title: ‘Cuba is next’ — Trump hints at new focus for US military after Iran, Venezuela operations
topStories.description: Trump did not specify what precisely he was planning to do with Cuba.

topStories.title: Congress MP S Jothimani alleges lack of transparency in Tamil Nadu constituency selection process
topStories.description: S Jothimani accused the Tamil Nadu Congress leadership of conducting the seat-sharing and selection process in a “highly secretive manner.”

topStories.title: DHS takes emergency action to pay 50,000 US airport workers unpaid since mid-February
topStories.description: The Department of Homeland Security is taking emergency measures to pay 50,000 unpaid airport security officers, following significant work absences causing airport disruptions. Details here.

topStories.title: PM Modi lacks courage to oppose Israel's actions in West Bank: Congress leader Jairam Ramesh
topStories.description: “The current West Asia war is providing cover for Israel to move ahead on its vision of Greater Israel and also finishing off any hope for a Palestinian state,” Jairam Ramesh said

topStories.title: Strait of Hormuz to ‘Strait of Trump’ — Internet in splits over Trump's slip up, netizens say US President ‘on brand’
topStories.description: Trump said that his comment was a ‘mistake’ but then added that 'there's no accidents with me.'

topStories.title: Supreme Court flags repeated breaches of law on disclosure of sexual assault survivors’ identity
topStories.description: Supreme Court warns of “general indifference” as case records reveal disclosure of sexual assault survivors’ identity, violating IPC Section 228A

topStories.title: US lifts sanctions on minerals industry of Venezuela, gains greater access to gold, diamonds, bauxite
topStories.description: Besides gold and the world's largest oil reserves, Venezuela also produces diamonds, bauxite and rare earths such as coltan, crucial for a range of high-tech products.

dailyNews.description: Vance said UFOs weren't aliens, describing this as a Christian understanding of ‘celestial beings who fly around who do weird things to people.’

dailyNews.title: Bank of America to pay $72.5 million to settle lawsuits brought in by Epstein accusers
dailyNews.description: Lawyers for the bank and the women had told Manhattan-based U.S. District Judge Jed Rakoff this month they had reached a “settlement in principle,” but terms of the deal were not disclosed at the time.

dailyNews.title: Am confident Sadiq will work for Cong’s win: DKS
dailyNews.description: Congress gains support from rebel Sadiq Pailwan for Davangere South by-election, aiming to avoid vote split against BJP contender.

dailyNews.title: Dem senators dodge crucial question on illegal alien accused of killing Chicago college student
dailyNews.description: After Sheridan Gorman's killing, several Democratic senators declined to clearly say whether the illegal immigrant charged in the case should have been deported

dailyNews.title: Too loud? Ticket’s in the mail
dailyNews.description: Noise cameras are spreading across U.S. cities, issuing automatic tickets up to $2,500. NYC has already collected nearly $2 million in fines since 2021.

dailyNews.title: House Republicans pass rival DHS plan, setting up Senate fight as shutdown set to become longest in history
dailyNews.description: House Republicans passed a two-month DHS funding extension, but the 42-day partial government shutdown remains far from over amid continued gridlock.

dailyNews.title: Tiger Woods released from jail after DUI arrest; eyes appear bloodshot in booking photo
dailyNews.description: Tiger Woods was released from jail Friday night after several hours after he was arrested for driving under the influence following a car crash near his Florida home.

dailyNews.title: Controversial viral influencer 'Clavicular' arrested in Florida on battery charges
dailyNews.description: "Looksmaxxing" influencer Braden Peters known as "Clavicular" arrested and facing battery charges after alleged Airbnb incident in February.

dailyNews.title: At least 2 students killed, several injured in school bus crash in Tennessee: 'A parent's worst nightmare'
dailyNews.description: Two students were killed and seven were injured in a school bus crash on Highway 70 in Carroll County, Tennessee, during a Kenwood Middle School field trip.

dailyNews.title: Sportscaster Jim Gray says Tiger Woods' DUI arrest is 'another cry for help'
dailyNews.description: Fox News contributor and sportscaster Jim Gray called Tiger Woods' DUI arrest a "cry for help," saying the golfer's troubling pattern raises questions about who surrounds him.

topStories.title: Carville doubles down on theory Trump will 'walk away' from office after midterms, get pardon from JD Vance
topStories.description: Carville doubled down on his theory that Trump will resign after the midterms, suggesting Trump will seek a pardon from JD Vance to avoid potential prosecutions after leaving office.

topStories.title: Trump reacts to Tiger Woods' rollover crash as golfer faces DUI charge: ‘Very close friend of mine’
topStories.description: Tiger Woods was arrested on a DUI charge weeks before the Masters, and President Donald Trump called the 15-time major winner a close friend in response to the car crash.

topStories.title: White House slams ‘trash reporting’ over claims ICE chief hospitalized for stress, yelled at by Trump admin
topStories.description: Politico reported that ICE acting Director Todd Lyons was hospitalized for stress linked to Trump's deportation push, but the White House calls it trash reporting.

topStories.title: At CPAC, the ‘America First’ Crowd Ponders Giving War a Chance
topStories.description: The Conservative Political Action Conference has been an America First gathering for years, but with President Trump pursuing war in Iran, organizers have tried to make a shift, with mixed results.

topStories.title: Trump Offers More Aid to Farmers, a Key Support Bloc Hurt by Tariffs and War
topStories.description: The president announced new loan guarantees at a White House event that appeared intended to reassure a group that has found itself caught in the crosshairs of some of his major policies.

topStories.title: Outside Kennedy Center, Jane Fonda and Joan Baez Raise Voices in Protest
topStories.description: The pair joined in a gathering of artists and others who denounced censorship and faulted President Trump’s growing influence over the nation’s cultural life.

topStories.title: Kennedy Center Performer Asks Judge to Toss Case He Calls ‘Retaliatory’
topStories.description: A jazz drummer who called off a performance in protest of the center’s being renamed for President Trump said the president’s allies had sued him as punishment.

dailyNews.title: "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan" guests for March 29, 2026
dailyNews.description: This week's guests include White House border czar Tom Homan, Democratic Rep. Jim Himes, and former U.S. Surgeon General Dr. Jerome Adams.

dailyNews.title: 2/20: The Takeout with Major Garrett
dailyNews.description: Supreme Court strikes down Trump's emergency tariffs; U.S. and Canada to face off for gold medal in men's hockey

dailyNews.title: Iran claims Strait of Hormuz is closed as Trump says talks are underway
dailyNews.description: According to a statement from Iran's Revolutionary Guards, the Strait of Hormuz is closed, and they vowed a severe response to any ship trying to get through. That seemed to contradict President Trump's claim that Iran had allowed 10 ships through the Strait as a gift. Holly Williams has details.

dailyNews.title: House GOP attempts to forge own path toward ending shutdown, disregarding Senate-backed bill
dailyNews.description: House lawmakers are at odds over a Senate bill that includes TSA pay, but excludes ICE funding. Eleanor Mueller, White House economic policy reporter for Semafor, and Riley Rogerson, House leadership reporter for Politico, join "The Takeout" to discuss.

dailyNews.title: Trump calls Strait of Hormuz the 'Strait of Trump'
dailyNews.description: Trump recently floated the possibility that the strait could be controlled jointly by "me and the ayatollah" as part of a resolution to the Iran war.

dailyNews.title: TSA funding update: House GOP spikes DHS funding proposal, extending shutdown that's caused airport delays
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump on Friday issued an executive order to pay Transportation Security Administration agents during the shutdown.

dailyNews.title: Epstein victims sue Google and the Trump administration over alleged disclosure of personal information
dailyNews.description: A lawsuit filed in Northern California alleges that Google's AI features generated contact information for Epstein victims.

dailyNews.title: White House launches app touting Trump's record, with some key omissions
dailyNews.description: The app includes a link to report tips to Immigration and Customs Enforcement.

dailyNews.title: Oil prices close at highest level since 2022 as Iran negotiations fail to ease supply fears
dailyNews.description: Oil prices traded higher after U.S. President Donald Trump said Iran had allowed 10 oil tankers to pass through the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Ambitious, authoritarian and talking to Trump? The hard-liners rising in Iran
dailyNews.description: The Israeli military has systematically killed Iran’s top leaders, so when President Donald Trump said this week that talks are being held with Iran, the biggest question was: Who exactly is the U.S. talking to

dailyNews.title: Markets plunge and U.S. oil hits $100 as Trump's attempt to reassure Wall Street fails
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump is used to bending financial markets to his will
